summary: Verified bug fix: uploaded deck photo now displays correctly in live preview. User reported 'i dont see it' after uploading HEIC deck photo. Main agent fixed by copying deck-after.jpg to both React public assets and static site assets, and updating App.js proofCards. All verification tests passed.

Before/After gallery displays 4 photo cards correctly
Fourth gallery card uses deck-after.jpg (not old proof-patio-after.jpg)
Fourth card labeled 'After' with caption 'Clean wooden deck'
Deck image src is /assets/deck-after.jpg and loads successfully
Deck image is visible on page
Hero book consultation button functional (href: https://forms.gle/11TXTAgdrrRsnP749)
Static site index.html correctly references assets/deck-after.jpg
Both React and static sites have identical deck-after.jpg files (3.8M)
No console errors or warnings detected
